20.anchor: Nahshon was the father of Salmon.
20.note: As in some Greek manuscripts (see also 4:21); Hebrew reads Salma.

17.anchor: So Ruth gathered barley there all day, and when she beat out the grain that evening, it filled an entire basket.
17.note: Hebrew it was about an ephah

20.anchor: bless him!” Naomi told her daughter-in-law. “He is showing his kindness to us as well as to your dead husband.
20.note: Hebrew to the living and to the dead.

15.anchor: Then Boaz said to her, “Bring your cloak and spread it out.” He measured six scoops
of barley into the cloak and placed it on her back. Then he
15.note: Most Hebrew manuscripts read he; she.

20.anchor: “Don’t call me Naomi,” she responded. “Instead, call me Mara,
